steps.t: Make your way to the entrance to the area known as Garth Agarwen, north-east of the Eglan-camp, and speak with Hartrím. Dannasen asked you to seek out…
The Hillmen of Rhudaur who serve the Red-maid and their brigand allies can be found in Garth Agarwen, the fortress of the Red-maid in the north-east o…
